skill_liegong.description_cn: 你【杀】的攻击范围为此【杀】点数。当你使用【杀】指定目标后，你可以执行以下效果：1.若其手牌数不大于你，其不能抵消此【杀】；2.若其体力值不小于你，此【杀】伤害值+1。
skill_liegong.description_en: The range of your [Kill] is equal to its point value. When you use a [Kill], you may: 1. If the target's hand cards are not more than yours, the [Kill] cannot be dodged; 2. If the target's health is not less than yours, the [Kill] deals +1 damage.

skill_rende.description_cn: 出牌阶段，每名角色限一次，你可以交给一名其他角色任意张手牌。当你本阶段以此法给出第二张牌时，你可以视为使用一张基本牌（使用【杀】有次数限制）。
skill_rende.description_en: Action Phase (once per character): You may give any number of cards to another character. When you give the second card this way in a turn, you may use a basic card (Slash count limits still apply).

skill_jijiang.description_cn: 主公技，其他蜀势力角色可以在你需要时代替你使用或打出【杀】（视为由你使用或打出）；每回合限一次，其他蜀势力角色于其回合外使用、打出或替你使用或打出【杀】时，其可以令你摸一张牌。
skill_jijiang.description_en: Lord Skill: Other Shu characters can play or use a [Kill] for you when required. Once per turn, when another Shu character plays a [Kill] outside their turn for you, they can let you draw 1 card.

skill_yijue.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以弃置一张牌，然后令一名其他角色展示一张手牌。若此牌为：黑色，其本回合非锁定技失效且不能使用或打出手牌，你本回合对其使用的红桃【杀】伤害+1；红色，你获得之，然后你可以令其回复1点体力。
skill_yijue.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Discard 1 card and make another character reveal 1 hand card. If Black: Their non-locked skills fail and they cannot use/play cards; your Heart [Kill] deals +1 damage to them. If Red: You gain the card and may let them recover 1 health.

skill_wusheng.description_cn: 你可以将一张红色牌当【杀】使用或打出。你使用的方片【杀】无距离限制。
skill_wusheng.description_en: You may use or play any red card as a [Kill]. Your Diamond [Kill] has no distance limit.

skill_tishen.description_cn: 限定技，准备阶段，你可以回复所有体力，然后摸X张牌（X为你回复的体力值）。
skill_tishen.description_en: Limited Skill (Preparation Phase): You may recover all health and draw X cards, where X is the amount of health recovered.

skill_paoxiao.description_cn: 锁定技，你使用【杀】无次数限制。当你使用的【杀】被抵消后，你本回合下一次【杀】造成的伤害+1。
skill_paoxiao.description_en: Locked Skill: No limit on [Kill] count. When your [Kill] is dodged, your next [Kill] this turn deals +1 damage.

skill_yajiao.description_cn: 当你于回合外使用或打出手牌时，你可以展示牌堆顶一张牌，若这两张牌类型：相同，你可以令一名角色获得展示牌；不同，你可以弃置攻击范围内包含你的一名角色区域里的一张牌。
skill_yajiao.description_en: When you use/play a card outside your turn, reveal the top card of the deck. If types match: A character gains the card. If different: Discard 1 card from the area of a character whose attack range includes you.

skill_longdan.description_cn: 你可以将一张【杀】当【闪】、【闪】当【杀】、【酒】当【桃】、【桃】当【酒】使用或打出。
skill_longdan.description_en: You may play [Kill] as [Dodge], [Dodge] as [Kill], [Wine] as [Peach], and [Peach] as [Wine].

skill_mashu.description_cn: 锁定技，你计算与其他角色的距离-1。
skill_mashu.description_en: Locked Skill: Your distance to others is calculated as -1.

skill_tieqi.description_cn: 当你使用【杀】指定目标后，你可以令其本回合非锁定技失效，然后你判定，除非其弃置一张与判定结果花色相同的牌，否则其不能抵消此【杀】。
skill_tieqi.description_en: When using [Kill], you can disable the target's non-locked skills for the turn. Perform a judgment; they cannot dodge unless they discard a card of the same suit as the judgment.

skill_zhuhai.description_cn: 其他角色的结束阶段，若其本回合造成过伤害，你可以对其使用一张【杀】。
skill_zhuhai.description_en: End Phase of another character: If they dealt damage this turn, you may use a [Kill] against them.

skill_qianxin.description_cn: 觉醒技，当你造成伤害后，若你已受伤，你减少1点体力上限并获得“荐言”。
skill_qianxin.description_en: Awakening Skill: After dealing damage, if you are injured, reduce your max health by 1 and gain 'Jianyan'.

skill_jianyan.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以选择一种牌的类别或颜色，然后亮出牌堆顶的一张牌，若此牌不为此类别或颜色，你重复此流程。你令一名男性角色获得最后亮出的此类别或颜色的牌，然后将其余亮出的牌置入弃牌堆
skill_jianyan.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Choose a card type or color and reveal the top card of the deck until you find a match. A male character gains that card; discard others.

skill_qixi.description_cn: 你可以将一张黑色牌当【过河拆桥】使用。
skill_qixi.description_en: You may play any black card as [Dismantle].

skill_fenwei.description_cn: 限定技，当一张锦囊牌指定多个目标后，你可以令此牌对任意个目标无效。
skill_fenwei.description_en: Limited Skill: When a tactic card targets multiple characters, you can make it ineffective for any number of targets.

skill_keji.description_cn: 若你未于本回合出牌阶段使用或打出过【杀】，你可以跳过弃牌阶段。
skill_keji.description_en: If you did not use or play [Kill] during your Action Phase, you may skip your Discard Phase.

skill_qinxue.description_cn: 觉醒技，准备阶段或结束阶段，若你的手牌数比体力值多2或更多，你减少1点体力上限，回复1点体力或摸两张牌，然后获得“攻心”。
skill_qinxue.description_en: Awakening Skill (Start/End Phase): If hand cards > health by 2+, reduce max health by 1, recover 1 health or draw 2 cards, and gain 'Gongxin'.

skill_botu.description_cn: 每轮限X次（X为存活角色数且至多为3），回合结束后，若本回合置入弃牌堆的牌包含四种花色，你可以执行一个额外回合。
skill_botu.description_en: Limited per round: If cards in the discard pile this turn contain four suits, you take an extra turn.

skill_kurou.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以弃置一张牌，然后失去1点体力。
skill_kurou.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Discard 1 card and lose 1 health.

skill_zhaxiang.description_cn: 锁定技，当你失去1点体力后，你摸三张牌，若在你的出牌阶段，你本回合使用【杀】的限制次数+1、使用红色【杀】无距离限制且不能被抵消。
skill_zhaxiang.description_en: Locked Skill: After losing 1 health, draw 3 cards. If in your Action Phase, [Kill] limit +1; red [Kill] has no range limit and cannot be dodged.

skill_yingzi.description_cn: 锁定技，摸牌阶段，你多摸一张牌。你的手牌上限为你的体力上限。
skill_yingzi.description_en: Locked Skill: Draw Phase, draw +1 card. Your hand card limit equals your max health.

skill_fanjian.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以展示并交给一名其他角色一张手牌，其选择一项：1.展示所有手牌，弃置与此牌相同花色的牌；2.失去1点体力。
skill_fanjian.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Show and give 1 card to another character. They choose: 1. Reveal all hand cards and discard same-suit cards; 2. Lose 1 health.

skill_liuli.description_cn: 当你成为【杀】的目标时，你可以弃置一张牌并将此【杀】转移给你攻击范围内的一名其他角色。
skill_liuli.description_en: When targeted by [Kill], discard 1 card to redirect it to another character in your attack range.

skill_guose.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以选择一项，然后摸一张牌：1.将一张方片牌当【乐不思蜀】使用；2.弃置一张方片牌和场上一张【乐不思蜀】。
skill_guose.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Choose one and draw 1 card: 1. Play a Diamond card as [Acedia]; 2. Discard 1 Diamond card and an [Acedia] on the field.

skill_qianxun.description_cn: 当一张延时锦囊牌或其他角色使用的普通锦囊牌对你生效时，若你为唯一目标，你可以将所有手牌移出游戏直到回合结束。
skill_qianxun.description_en: When a tactic card with you as the sole target takes effect, you may move all your cards out of play until the end of the turn.

skill_lianying.description_cn: 当你失去所有手牌后，你可以令至多X名角色各摸一张牌（X为你失去的手牌数）。
skill_lianying.description_en: After losing all cards, you can let up to X characters draw 1 card each, where X is the number of cards lost.

skill_jianxiong.description_cn: 当你受到伤害后，你可以摸一张牌，并获得造成此伤害的牌。
skill_jianxiong.description_en: After taking damage, you may draw 1 card and gain the card that caused the damage.

skill_hujia.description_cn: 主公技，其他魏势力角色可以在你需要时代替你使用或打出【闪】（然后视为由你使用或打出）。每回合限一次，当其他魏势力角色于其回合外使用或打出【闪】时，其可以令你摸一张牌。
skill_hujia.description_en: Lord Skill: Other Wei characters can play [Dodge] for you. Once per turn, when another Wei character plays [Dodge] outside their turn, they can let you draw 1 card.

skill_fankui.description_cn: 当你受到1点伤害后，你可以获得伤害来源的一张牌。
skill_fankui.description_en: After taking 1 damage, you may gain 1 card from the damage source.

skill_guicai.description_cn: 当一张判定牌生效前，你可以用一张牌代替之。
skill_guicai.description_en: Before a judgment card takes effect, you may replace it with a card from your hand.

skill_ganglie.description_cn: 当一名角色对你造成1点伤害后，你可以判定，若结果为：红色，你对其造成1点伤害；黑色，你弃置其一张牌。
skill_ganglie.description_en: After taking 1 damage, perform a judgment. If Red: Deal 1 damage to the source. If Black: Discard 1 card from the source.

skill_qingjian.description_cn: 每回合限一次，当你在摸牌阶段外获得牌后，你可以展示并交给一名其他角色任意张牌，令当前回合角色本回合手牌上限+X（X为你给出牌的类型数）。
skill_qingjian.description_en: Once per turn, after obtaining cards outside your Draw Phase, show and give any number of cards to another character. The current player's hand limit increases by the number of card types given.

skill_tuxi.description_cn: 摸牌阶段，你可以少摸任意张牌并获得等量其他角色的各一张手牌。
skill_tuxi.description_en: Draw Phase: You can draw fewer cards and instead take the same number of cards from other characters' hands.

skill_luoyi.description_cn: 摸牌阶段开始前，你可以亮出牌堆顶的三张牌，然后你可以跳过摸牌阶段并获得其中所有基本牌、武器牌和【决斗】，且直到你的下回合开始，你为伤害来源的【杀】和【决斗】对目标角色造成的伤害+1。
skill_luoyi.description_en: Before Draw Phase: Reveal top 3 cards. You can skip drawing to gain all basic, weapon, and [Duel] cards from them; your [Kill] and [Duel] deal +1 damage until your next turn.

skill_tiandu.description_cn: 当你的判定牌生效后，你可以获得此牌。
skill_tiandu.description_en: After a judgment card takes effect, you gain the card.

skill_yiji.description_cn: 当你受到1点伤害后，你可以摸两张牌，然后你可以交给至多两名其他角色共计至多两张手牌。
skill_yiji.description_en: After taking 1 damage, draw 2 cards and give up to 2 cards to up to 2 other characters.

skill_xunxun.description_cn: 摸牌阶段开始时，你可以观看牌堆顶的四张牌，然后将其中两张牌置于牌堆顶，将剩余牌置于牌堆底。
skill_xunxun.description_en: Start of Draw Phase: View top 4 cards. Put 2 on top and 2 at the bottom of the deck.

skill_wangxi.description_cn: 当你对其他角色造成1点伤害后，或受到其他角色的1点伤害后，你可以摸两张牌并交给该角色其中一张牌。
skill_wangxi.description_en: After dealing or taking 1 damage to/from another character, draw 2 cards and give 1 to that character.

skill_jijiu.description_cn: 在你的回合外，你可以将一张红色牌当【桃】使用。
skill_jijiu.description_en: Outside your turn, you may play any red card as [Peach].

skill_chuli.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以选择任意名势力各不相同的其他角色，弃置你和这些角色的各一张牌，然后被弃置黑桃牌的角色各摸一张牌。
skill_chuli.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Choose characters from different factions. Discard 1 card from each and yourself. Those who discarded Spades draw 1 card.

skill_wushuang.description_cn: 锁定技，你使用的【杀】需两张【闪】才能抵消；与你【决斗】的角色每次需打出两张【杀】。
skill_wushuang.description_en: Locked Skill: Your [Kill] requires 2 [Dodge] to evade. Opponents in [Duel] with you must play 2 [Kill] at a time.

skill_liyu.description_cn: 当你使用【杀】对其他角色造成伤害后，你可以获得其区域里的一张牌，若获得的牌：不为装备牌，其摸一张牌；为装备牌，你视为对由其指定的另一名角色使用一张【决斗】。
skill_liyu.description_en: After damaging a character with [Kill], gain 1 card from their area. If not equipment: they draw 1. If equipment: you use [Duel] on a target they choose.

skill_yicong.description_cn: 锁定技，你计算与其他角色的距离-1；若你的体力值不大于2，其他角色计算与你的距离+1。
skill_yicong.description_en: Locked Skill: Your distance to others is -1. If health <= 2, others' distance to you is +1.

skill_qiaomeng.description_cn: 当你使用【杀】对一名角色造成伤害后，你可以弃置其区域里的一张牌。若此牌为坐骑牌，你获得之。
skill_qiaomeng.description_en: After damaging a character with [Kill], you may discard 1 card from their area. If it is a mount, you gain it.

skill_kongcheng.description_cn: 锁定技，若你没有手牌，你不能成为【杀】或【决斗】的目标。
skill_kongcheng.description_en: Locked Skill: If you have no hand cards, you cannot be targeted by [Kill] or [Duel].

skill_guanxing.description_cn: 准备阶段，你可以观看牌堆顶的五张牌（存活角色数小于4时改为三张），然后将之以任意顺序置于牌堆顶或牌堆底。若皆置于牌堆底，结束阶段你可以再次发动本技能。
skill_guanxing.description_en: Preparation Phase: View top 5 cards (3 if players < 4) and place them on top/bottom in any order. If all go to the bottom, activate again in End Phase.

skill_jizhi.description_cn: 当你使用非转化锦囊牌时，你可以摸一张牌，若此牌是基本牌，你可以弃置此牌令你本回合手牌上限+1。
skill_jizhi.description_en: When playing a non-converted tactic card, draw 1 card. If basic, you can discard it to increase hand limit by 1 for the turn.

skill_qicai.description_cn: 锁定技，你使用锦囊牌无距离限制。当其他角色弃置你装备区里的防具或宝物牌时，你防止之。
skill_qicai.description_en: Locked Skill: Tactic cards have no distance limit. Prevent others from discarding armor or treasures in your equipment area.

skill_zhiheng.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以弃置任意张牌，然后摸等量张牌，若你以此法弃置了所有手牌，你额外摸一张牌。
skill_zhiheng.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Discard any number of cards and draw the same number. Draw 1 extra if all hand cards were discarded.

skill_jiuyuan.description_cn: 主公技，其他吴势力角色于其回合内回复体力时，若其体力值大于等于你，则其可以改为令你回复1点体力，然后其摸一张牌。
skill_jiuyuan.description_en: Lord Skill: When another Wu character recovers health, they can instead let you recover 1 health and then they draw 1 card.

skill_xiaoji.description_cn: 当你失去装备区里的一张牌后，你可以摸两张牌。
skill_xiaoji.description_en: When you lose a card from your equipment area, you may draw 2 cards.

skill_jieyin.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以选择一名男性角色，弃置一张手牌或将一张装备牌置入其装备区，然后你与其中体力值较大的角色摸一张牌，体力值较小的角色回复1点体力。
skill_jieyin.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Choose a male character, discard 1 card or equip them. You and the one with more health draw 1; the one with less health recovers 1.

skill_qingguo.description_cn: 你可以将一张黑色手牌当【闪】使用或打出。
skill_qingguo.description_en: You may play any black hand card as [Dodge].

skill_luoshen.description_cn: 准备阶段，你可以判定，若结果为黑色，你获得此牌，然后你可以重复此流程。以此法获得的牌本回合不计入手牌上限。
skill_luoshen.description_en: Preparation Phase: Perform judgment; if black, gain it and repeat. Cards gained this way don't count towards hand limit this turn.

skill_lijian.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以弃置一张牌令一名男性角色视为对另一名男性角色使用一张【决斗】（不能被【无懈可击】抵消）。
skill_lijian.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Discard 1 card to make a male character use [Duel] against another male character (cannot be negated).

skill_biyue.description_cn: 结束阶段，若你没有手牌，你可以摸两张牌，否则你可以摸一张牌。
skill_biyue.description_en: End Phase: If you have no hand cards, draw 2; otherwise, draw 1.

skill_yaowu.description_cn: 锁定技，当你受到伤害时，若造成伤害的牌：为红色，伤害来源摸一张牌；不为红色，你摸一张牌。
skill_yaowu.description_en: Locked Skill: When taking damage: if red card, source draws 1; if not red, you draw 1.

skill_shizhan.description_cn: 出牌阶段限两次，你可以令一名其他角色视为对你使用一张【决斗】。
skill_shizhan.description_en: Action Phase (limit 2): You can let another character use [Duel] against you.

skill_huashen.description_cn: 游戏开始时，你随机获得三张武将牌作为“化身”牌，然后展示其中一张，获得此“化身”牌上的一个技能，且性别和势力视为与之相同。回合开始时和回合结束后，你可以选择一项：1.替换展示的“化身”牌及因此获得的技能；2.移去至多两张“化身”牌并获得等量新的“化身”牌。
skill_huashen.description_en: Start of game: Gain 3 random characters as 'Avatars'. Reveal 1 to gain a skill and its gender/faction. Start/End of turn: Replace revealed Avatar/skill or cycle Avatars.

skill_xinsheng.description_cn: 当你受到1点伤害后，你可以获得一张新的“化身”牌。
skill_xinsheng.description_en: After taking 1 damage, you may gain a new 'Avatar' card.

skill_leiji.description_cn: 当你使用或打出【闪】或使用【闪电】时，你可以判定。当你判定后，若结果为：黑桃，你可以对一名角色造成2点雷电伤害；梅花，你回复1点体力并可以对一名角色造成1点雷电伤害。
skill_leiji.description_en: When using/playing [Dodge] or [Lightning], judge. If Spades: deal 2 lightning damage. If Clubs: recover 1 health and deal 1 lightning damage.

skill_guidao.description_cn: 当一张判定牌生效前，你可以用一张黑色牌替换之，若此黑色牌为黑桃2~9，你摸一张牌。
skill_guidao.description_en: Before a judgment takes effect, replace it with a black card. If Spade 2-9, draw 1 card.

skill_huangtian.description_cn: 主公技，其他群势力角色的出牌阶段限一次，其可以交给你一张【闪】或黑桃手牌。
skill_huangtian.description_en: Lord Skill: Once per turn, other Qun characters can give you a [Dodge] or Spade card.

skill_guhuo.description_cn: 每回合限一次，你可以扣置一张手牌当任意基本牌或普通锦囊牌使用或打出。其他角色可以同时质疑并翻开此牌：若为假，此牌作废，质疑者摸一张牌；若为真，质疑者获得“缠怨”，然后弃置一张牌或失去1点体力。
skill_guhuo.description_en: Once per turn: Play a card face down as any basic or tactic. Others can challenge; if fake, it's null and challenger draws 1. If real, challenger gets 'Infatuation' and loses 1 health or card.

skill_luanji.description_cn: 你可以将两张花色相同的手牌当【万箭齐发】使用。你使用【万箭齐发】可以少选一个目标。
skill_luanji.description_en: Play 2 cards of the same suit as [Hail of Arrows]. You can choose 1 fewer target.

skill_xueyi.description_cn: 主公技，游戏开始时，你获得X枚“裔”标记（X为群势力角色数的两倍）。出牌阶段开始时，你可以移除1枚“裔”并摸一张牌。你每有1枚“裔”，手牌上限便+1。
skill_xueyi.description_en: Lord Skill: Start with X 'Descendant' tokens (2x Qun characters). Start of Action Phase: Remove 1 token to draw 1; tokens increase hand limit by 1.

skill_xiangle.description_cn: 锁定技，当你成为一名角色使用【杀】的目标后，除非其弃置一张基本牌，否则令此【杀】对你无效。
skill_xiangle.description_en: Locked Skill: When targeted by [Kill], the attacker must discard a basic card or the [Kill] is negated.

skill_fangquan.description_cn: 你可以跳过出牌阶段，然后弃牌阶段开始时，你可以弃置一张手牌并令一名其他角色执行一个额外的回合。
skill_fangquan.description_en: You may skip Action Phase; at Discard Phase, discard 1 card to grant another character an extra turn.

skill_ruoyu.description_cn: 主公技，觉醒技，准备阶段，若你是全场体力值最小的角色，你增加1点体力上限，回复至3点体力，然后获得“激将”“思蜀”。
skill_ruoyu.description_en: Lord Awakening Skill: If you have the lowest health at Start Phase, +1 max health, recover to 3, and gain 'Jijiang' and 'Sishu'.

skill_zhiba.description_cn: 主公技，出牌阶段限一次，你可以与一名其他吴势力角色拼点；其他吴势力角色出牌阶段限一次，其可以与你拼点（你可以拒绝）：若其没赢，你可以获得两张拼点牌。
skill_zhiba.description_en: Lord Skill: Once per turn, you can Pindian with a Wu character; they can also Pindian with you. If they don't win, you gain both cards.

skill_jiang.description_cn: 当你使用【决斗】或红色【杀】指定目标后，或成为【决斗】或红色【杀】的目标后，你可以摸一张牌。每回合首次【决斗】或红色【杀】因弃置进入弃牌堆后，你可以失去1点体力获得之。
skill_jiang.description_en: Draw 1 card when using or being targeted by [Duel] or red [Kill]. If such a card is discarded, lose 1 health to gain it (once per turn).

skill_hunzi.description_cn: 觉醒技，准备阶段，若你的体力值为1，你减少1点体力上限并获得“英姿”“英魂”，本回合结束阶段，你摸两张牌或回复1点体力。
skill_hunzi.description_en: Awakening Skill: If health is 1 at Start Phase, -1 max health and gain 'Yingzi' and 'Yinghun'. End Phase: draw 2 or recover 1.

skill_shensu.description_cn: 你可以选择至多三项：1.跳过判定阶段和摸牌阶段；2.跳过出牌阶段并弃置一张装备牌；3.跳过弃牌阶段并翻面。你每选择一项，你视为使用一张无距离限制的【杀】。
skill_shensu.description_en: Choose up to 3: 1. Skip Judgment/Draw Phase; 2. Skip Action Phase and discard equipment; 3. Skip Discard Phase and flip. Each choice counts as a rangeless [Kill].

skill_shebian.description_cn: 当你翻面时，你可以移动场上一张装备牌。
skill_shebian.description_en: When you flip over, you may move 1 equipment card on the field.

skill_bazhen.description_cn: 锁定技，若你的装备区里没有防具牌，你视为装备着【八卦阵】。
skill_bazhen.description_en: Locked Skill: If no armor is equipped, you are treated as having [Eight Trigrams] equipped.

skill_cangzhuo.description_cn: 锁定技，弃牌阶段开始时，若你本回合未使用过锦囊牌，你的锦囊牌不计入手牌上限。
skill_cangzhuo.description_en: Locked Skill: If no tactics were used this turn, your tactic cards don't count towards hand limit at Discard Phase.

skill_huoji.description_cn: 你可以将一张红色牌当【火攻】使用。你的【火攻】改为令目标展示随机手牌，你弃置与展示牌颜色相同的牌以造成伤害。
skill_huoji.description_en: Play red cards as [Fire Attack]. Targets reveal a random card; discard the same color to deal damage.

skill_kanpo.description_cn: 你可以将一张黑色牌当【无懈可击】使用。你的【无懈可击】不能被响应。
skill_kanpo.description_en: Play black cards as [Nullification]. Your [Nullification] cannot be countered.

skill_lianhuan.description_cn: 你可以将一张梅花牌当【铁索连环】使用或重铸。你使用【铁索连环】可以多指定一个目标。
skill_lianhuan.description_en: Play Club cards as [Iron Shackles] or recast them. Target 1 extra person with [Iron Shackles].

skill_niepan.description_cn: 限定技，当你处于濒死状态时，你可以：弃置所有牌，复原你的武将牌，摸三张牌，回复至3点体力，然后获得“八阵”“火计”“看破”中的一个。
skill_niepan.description_en: Limited Skill (Near Death): Discard all cards, reset character card, draw 3, recover to 3 health, and gain one of: Bazhen, Huoji, or Kanpo.

skill_kuanggu.description_cn: 当你对距离1以内的一名角色造成1点伤害后，你可以回复1点体力或摸一张牌。
skill_kuanggu.description_en: After damaging a character within distance 1, recover 1 health or draw 1 card.

skill_qimou.description_cn: 限定技，出牌阶段，你可以失去任意点体力并摸X张牌（X为你以此法失去的体力值），然后你本回合计算与其他角色的距离-X且使用【杀】的限制次数+X。
skill_qimou.description_en: Limited Skill: Lose any health to draw X cards (X is health lost). Distance to others -X and [Kill] limit +X for the turn.

skill_hongyan.description_cn: 锁定技，你的黑桃牌和黑桃判定牌视为红桃牌。若你的装备区里有红桃牌，你的手牌上限等于体力上限。
skill_hongyan.description_en: Locked Skill: Spades are Hearts. If Hearts are equipped, hand limit equals max health.

skill_tianxiang.description_cn: 当你受到伤害时，你可以弃置一张红桃牌防止之并选择一项，令一名其他角色：1.受到伤害来源的1点伤害并摸X张牌（X为其已损失体力值且至多为5）；2.失去1点体力并获得你弃置的牌。
skill_tianxiang.description_en: When taking damage, discard 1 Heart to prevent it. Another character either: 1. Takes 1 damage from the source and draws X cards (lost health, max 5); 2. Loses 1 health and gains the discarded card.

skill_piaoling.description_cn: 结束阶段，你可以判定，若结果为红桃，你将判定牌置于牌堆顶或交给一名角色，若该角色是你，你弃置一张牌。
skill_piaoling.description_en: End Phase: Judge. If Heart, put card on top or give to someone. If given to yourself, discard 1 card.

skill_yinghun.description_cn: 准备阶段，若你已受伤，你可以选择一名其他角色并选择一项：1.令其摸X张牌，然后弃置一张牌；2.令其摸一张牌，然后弃置X张牌。（X为你已损失体力值）
skill_yinghun.description_en: Preparation Phase (if injured): Target character either: 1. Draws X, discards 1; 2. Draws 1, discards X (X is lost health).

skill_wulie.description_cn: 限定技，结束阶段，你可以失去任意点体力，令X名其他角色获得“烈”标记（X为以此法失去的体力值）。当有“烈”的角色受到伤害时，其移除“烈”并防止此伤害。
skill_wulie.description_en: Limited Skill: Lose health to give X characters 'Lie' tokens. Tokens prevent the next instance of damage.

skill_jianchu.description_cn: 当你使用【杀】指定目标后，你可以弃置其一张牌，若弃置的牌是：基本牌，其获得此【杀】；非基本牌，其不能抵消此【杀】，你本回合使用【杀】的限制次数+1。
skill_jianchu.description_en: When using [Kill], discard 1 of their cards. If basic: they gain the [Kill]. If non-basic: it's unavoidable and [Kill] limit +1.

skill_tianyi.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以拼点：若你赢，你本回合使用【杀】的次数+1、无距离限制且可以多指定一个目标；若你没赢，你本回合不能使用【杀】。
skill_tianyi.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Pindian. If win: [Kill] count +1, no range limit, target 1 extra character. If lose: cannot use [Kill] this turn.

skill_hanzhan.description_cn: 当你拼点前，你可以令对方用随机手牌拼点。当你拼点后，你可以获得拼点牌中点数最大的【杀】。
skill_hanzhan.description_en: Before Pindian, make opponent use a random card. After, you can gain the highest-point [Kill] from the Pindian cards.

skill_roulin.description_cn: 锁定技，你对女性角色使用的【杀】和女性角色对你使用的【杀】均需使用两张【闪】才能抵消。
skill_roulin.description_en: Locked Skill: [Kill] between you and female characters requires 2 [Dodge] to evade.

skill_benhuai.description_cn: 锁定技，结束阶段，若你不是体力值最小的角色，你失去1点体力或减少1点体力上限。
skill_benhuai.description_en: Locked Skill: End Phase, if you don't have the lowest health, lose 1 health or 1 max health.

skill_jiuchi.description_cn: 你可以将一张黑桃手牌当【酒】使用。你使用【酒】无次数限制。当你使用【酒】【杀】造成伤害后，本回合“崩坏”失效。
skill_jiuchi.description_en: Play Spade cards as [Wine]. Unlimited [Wine] use. Damaging with [Wine][Kill] negates 'Benhuai' for the turn.

skill_baonue.description_cn: 主公技，当其他群势力角色造成1点伤害后，你可以判定，若结果为黑桃，你回复1点体力并获得此判定牌。
skill_baonue.description_en: Lord Skill: When another Qun character deals damage, judge; if Spades, you recover 1 health and gain the card.

skill_tuntian.description_cn: 当你于回合外失去牌后，或你于回合内弃置【杀】后，你可以判定，若结果不为红桃，将判定牌置于你的武将牌上，称为“田”。你计算与其他角色的距离-X（X为“田”的数量）。
skill_tuntian.description_en: After losing cards outside turn or discarding [Kill] in turn, judge. If not Heart, place on character card as 'Field'. Distance to others -X (X is number of Fields).

skill_zaoxian.description_cn: 觉醒技，准备阶段，若“田”的数量不小于3，你减少1点体力上限，然后获得“急袭”，你于本回合结束后执行一个额外回合。
skill_zaoxian.description_en: Awakening Skill: If Fields >= 3, -1 max health and gain 'Jixi'. Take an extra turn after this one.

skill_juxiang.description_cn: 锁定技，【南蛮入侵】对你无效。当其他角色使用的【南蛮入侵】结算结束后，你获得之。
skill_juxiang.description_en: Locked Skill: [Savage Invasion] is ineffective against you. Gain the card after it is used by others.

skill_lieren.description_cn: 当你使用【杀】对目标角色造成伤害后，你可以与其拼点：若你赢，你获得其一张牌。
skill_lieren.description_en: After damaging with [Kill], you may Pindian; if win, gain 1 of their cards.

skill_tiaoxin.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以选择一名攻击范围内包含你的角色，然后除非其对你使用一张【杀】且此【杀】对你造成伤害，否则你弃置其一张牌，然后本阶段本技能限两次。
skill_tiaoxin.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Choose someone who can attack you; unless they [Kill] and damage you, discard 1 of their cards. Limit 2 uses.

skill_zhiji.description_cn: 觉醒技，准备阶段或结束阶段，若你没有手牌，你回复1点体力或摸两张牌，然后减少1点体力上限，获得“观星”。
skill_zhiji.description_en: Awakening Skill: If no hand cards at Start/End Phase, recover 1 health or draw 2, -1 max health, and gain 'Guanxing'.

skill_weimu.description_cn: 黑色锦囊牌对你无效；你可以将一张黑色非锦囊牌当【借刀杀人】使用。
skill_weimu.description_en: Black tactics are ineffective. Play black non-tactic cards as [Borrowing a Weapon].

skill_luanwu.description_cn: 限定技,出牌阶段,你可以令所有其他角色须对各自距 离最近的角色使用一张【杀】,否则失去点体力。
skill_luanwu.description_en: Limited Skill: Force all others to [Kill] their nearest neighbor or lose 1 health.

skill_wansha.description_cn: 锁定技，你的回合内：除处于濒死状态的角色外的其他角色的红色基本牌均视为【杀】，此【杀】被使用时你摸两张牌。
skill_wansha.description_en: Locked Skill (Your Turn): Others' red basic cards are [Kill] (except for near-death characters). Draw 2 when such a [Kill] is used.

skill_haoshi.description_cn: 摸牌阶段，你可以多摸两张牌，然后若你的手牌数大于5，则你将一半的手牌（向下取整）交给手牌最少的一名其他角色。
skill_haoshi.description_en: Draw Phase: Draw +2 cards. If hand cards > 5, give half (rounded down) to the character with the fewest hand cards.

skill_dimeng.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以选择两名其他角色并弃置X张牌（X为这两名角色手牌数的差），然后令这两名角色交换手牌。
skill_dimeng.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Discard X cards to make two other characters swap hands, where X is the difference in their hand card counts.

skill_qiaobian.description_cn: 你可以弃置一张手牌，跳过除准备阶段和结束阶段外的一个阶段，然后若你以此法：跳过摸牌阶段，获得一至两名角色的各一张手牌；跳过出牌阶段，你可以移动场上的一张牌。
skill_qiaobian.description_en: Discard 1 card to skip a phase (except Start/End). If Draw Phase skipped: Take 1 card from 1-2 players. If Action Phase skipped: Move 1 card on the field.

skill_huoshou.description_cn: 锁定技，【南蛮入侵】对你无效。当其他角色使用【南蛮入侵】指定目标后，你代替其成为此牌的伤害来源。
skill_huoshou.description_en: Locked Skill: [Savage Invasion] is ineffective. You become the source of damage when others use it.

skill_zaiqi.description_cn: 结束阶段，你可以令至多X名角色各选择一项（X为本回合置入弃牌堆的红色牌数量）：1.摸一张牌；2.令你回复1点体力。
skill_zaiqi.description_en: End Phase: Up to X characters (X = red cards discarded this turn) choose: 1. Draw 1; 2. You recover 1 health.

skill_duanliang.description_cn: 你可以将一张黑色基本牌或黑色装备牌当【兵粮寸断】使用。若你本回合未造成过伤害，你使用【兵粮寸断】无距离限制。
skill_duanliang.description_en: Play black basic/equipment cards as [Rations Depleted]. No range limit if you dealt no damage this turn.

skill_jiezi.description_cn: 当一名角色跳过摸牌阶段后，你可以选择一名角色，若其手牌数全场最少且没有“辎”，其获得“辎”标记，否则其摸一张牌。有“辎”的角色于其摸牌阶段结束时移除“辎”，然后执行一个额外的摸牌阶段。
skill_jiezi.description_en: When a phase is skipped, target draws 1. If fewest cards and no 'Zi', they get a 'Zi' token (extra Draw Phase next turn).

skill_duanchang.description_cn: 锁定技，当你死亡时，杀死你的角色失去所有技能。
skill_duanchang.description_en: Locked Skill: Upon your death, the character who killed you loses all skills.

skill_beige.description_cn: 当一名角色受到【杀】的伤害后，若你有牌，你可以令其判定，然后你可以弃置一张牌，根据判定结果执行：红桃，其回复1点体力；方片，其摸两张牌；梅花，伤害来源弃置两张牌；黑桃，伤害来源翻面。若判定牌与你弃置的牌：花色相同，你获得判定牌；点数相同，你获得你弃置的牌。
skill_beige.description_en: After [Kill] damage, target judges; you discard 1 card. Result - Heart: recover 1; Diamond: draw 2; Club: source discards 2; Spade: source flips. Gain card if suit/point matches.

skill_quhu.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以与体力值大于你的一名角色拼点：若你赢，其对其攻击范围内一名由你选择的角色造成1点伤害；若你没赢，其对你造成1点伤害。
skill_quhu.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Pindian with someone with more health. Win: They damage a target you choose. Lose: They damage you.

skill_jieming.description_cn: 当你受到1点伤害后或死亡时，你可以令一名角色摸X张牌，然后将手牌弃至X张（X为其体力上限且至多为5）。
skill_jieming.description_en: After taking 1 damage or dying: Target draws up to X cards (X is max health, cap 5).

skill_qiangxi.description_cn: 出牌阶段限两次，你可以受到1点伤害或弃置一张武器牌，对一名本回合内未以此法指定过的其他角色造成1点伤害。
skill_qiangxi.description_en: Twice per Action Phase: Lose 1 health or discard a weapon to deal 1 damage to a new target.

skill_ninge.description_cn: 锁定技，当一名角色每回合第二次受到伤害后，若其为你或伤害来源为你，你摸一张牌并弃置其场上一张牌。
skill_ninge.description_en: Locked Skill: When a character takes damage for the 2nd time in a turn (involving you), draw 1 card and discard 1 of theirs.

skill_shuangxiong.description_cn: 摸牌阶段结束时，你可以弃置一张牌，然后你本回合可以将一张与之颜色不同的牌当【决斗】使用。结束阶段，你获得本回合对你造成伤害的牌。
skill_shuangxiong.description_en: End of Draw Phase: Discard 1 card; play other-colored cards as [Duel] this turn. End Phase: Gain cards that damaged you.

skill_zhijian.description_cn: 出牌阶段,你可以将手牌中的一张装备牌置于一名其 他角色的装备区里,然后你摸一张牌:当你于出牌阶 段内使用装备牌时,你摸一张牌。
skill_zhijian.description_en: Action Phase: Put an equipment from hand onto someone else and draw 1. Draw 1 whenever you use an equipment.

skill_guzheng.description_cn: 其他角色的开牌阶段结束时,你可以将弃牌准里该角 色此阶段内拜置的一张手牌返还给其,然后你可以获 得弃牌堆里所有其余于此阶段内弃置的牌。
skill_guzheng.description_en: End of another's Discard Phase: Return 1 discarded hand card to them and gain all other discarded cards.

skill_pojun.description_cn: 当你使用【杀】指定目标后，你可以将其至多X张牌移出游戏直到回合结束（X为其体力值）。你使用的【杀】对手牌区与装备区内牌数皆不大于你的角色造成的伤害+1。
skill_pojun.description_en: When using [Kill], remove up to X of their cards until turn end (X = health). [Kill] deals +1 damage if their cards <= yours.

skill_xuanfeng.description_cn: 当你失去装备区里的牌后，或一次性失去至少两张牌后，你可以依次弃置至多两名其他角色共计至多两张牌。
skill_xuanfeng.description_en: After losing equipment or 2+ cards at once, discard up to 2 cards from up to 2 other characters.

skill_zhichi.description_cn: 锁定技，当你于回合外受到伤害后，直到当前回合结束，【杀】和普通锦囊牌对你无效。
skill_zhichi.description_en: Locked Skill: After taking damage outside your turn, [Kill] and tactics are ineffective against you until the turn ends.

skill_mingce.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以将一张装备牌或【杀】交给一名其他角色，然后其选择一项：1.视为对其攻击范围内你选择的另一名角色使用【杀】；2.摸一张牌。
skill_mingce.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Give equipment or [Kill] to another. They either: 1. Use [Kill] on a target you choose; 2. Draw 1 card.

skill_jiangchi.description_cn: 摸牌阶段结束时，你可以选择一项：1.摸一张牌，你本回合使用【杀】的次数-1，且【杀】不计入手牌上限；2.重铸一张牌，且本回合使用【杀】的次数+1，【杀】无距离限制。
skill_jiangchi.description_en: End of Draw Phase: 1. Draw 1, [Kill] limit -1, [Kill] ignores hand limit; 2. Recast 1, [Kill] limit +1, no range limit.

skill_zongshi.description_cn: 当你拼点赢时，你可以获得点数较小的拼点牌；当你拼点没赢时，你可以获得你的拼点牌。
skill_zongshi.description_en: If win Pindian: Gain the lower card. If not win: Gain your own card.

skill_qiaoshuo.description_cn: 出牌阶段，你可以拼点：若你赢，你本回合使用的下一张牌可以多指定或少指定一个目标；若你没赢，此技能失效且你不能使用锦囊牌直到回合结束。
skill_qiaoshuo.description_en: Action Phase Pindian: If win, next card targets +/- 1 person. If not win, skill fails and cannot use tactics until turn ends.

skill_zongxuan.description_cn: 当你的牌因弃置而置入弃牌堆后，或你上家的牌于每回合首次因弃置而置入弃牌堆后，你可以将其中任意张牌置于牌堆顶。
skill_zongxuan.description_en: When your or previous player's card is discarded, you may put it on top of the deck.

skill_zhiyan.description_cn: 你上家或你的结束阶段，你可以令一名角色摸一张牌并展示之，若为装备牌，其使用之并回复1点体力。若为非装备牌且其体力值不等于你，其失去1点体力。
skill_zhiyan.description_en: End Phase: Target draws and shows 1 card. If equipment: use and recover 1 health. If not equipment and health != yours: they lose 1 health.

skill_xianzhen.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以与一名角色拼点。若你赢，直到回合结束，你无视该角色的防具，且对该角色使用牌没有距离和次数限制；若你没赢，本回合你不能使用【杀】。
skill_xianzhen.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Pindian. If win: Ignore target's armor and use cards on them without range/count limits. If lose: cannot use [Kill] this turn.

skill_jinjiu.description_cn: 锁定技，你的【酒】只能当做【杀】。
skill_jinjiu.description_en: Locked Skill: Your [Wine] can only be played as [Kill].

skill_xuanhuo.description_cn: 摸牌阶段结束时，你可以交给一名其他角色两张牌，令其选择一项：1.对你指定的另一名角色使用一张【杀】；2.你观看其手牌并获得其两张牌。
skill_xuanhuo.description_en: End of Draw Phase: Give 2 cards to another. They choose: 1. [Kill] a target you choose; 2. You view their hand and take 2 cards.

skill_enyuan.description_cn: 当你获得一名其他角色至少两张牌后，你可以令其摸一张牌。当你受到1点伤害后，你可以令伤害来源选择一项：1.交给你一张红色手牌；2.失去1点体力。
skill_enyuan.description_en: When gaining 2+ cards from another, they draw 1. After taking 1 damage, source either: 1. Gives you a red card; 2. Loses 1 health.

skill_lihuo.description_cn: 你使用的非火【杀】可以改为火【杀】使用，此牌结算后，若其造成伤害，你弃置一张牌或失去1体力。你使用的火【杀】可以多指定一个目标。
skill_lihuo.description_en: Play normal [Kill] as Fire [Kill]; if damage dealt, discard 1 or lose 1 health. Fire [Kill] can target 1 extra character.

skill_chunlao.description_cn: 你或你相邻角色的【杀】因弃置置入弃牌堆后，将之置于你的武将牌上，称为“醇”。当一名角色处于濒死状态时，你可以移去X张“醇”视为其使用一张【酒】(X为本轮以此法使用【酒】的次数)。
skill_chunlao.description_en: Discarded [Kill] from you/neighbors become 'Chun' tokens. Move X tokens to save a dying character as if using [Wine] (X = use count this round).

skill_jueqing.description_cn: 锁定技，你即将造成的伤害视为失去体力。
skill_jueqing.description_en: Locked Skill: Your damage is treated as losing health.

skill_shangshi.description_cn: 当你的手牌数小于X时，你可以将手牌摸至X张。（X为你已损失的体力值数）
skill_shangshi.description_en: When hand cards < lost health (X), draw up to X cards.

skill_xianzhou.description_cn: 限定技，出牌阶段，你可以将你装备区里的所有牌交给一名其他角色，然后其选择一项：1.令你回复X点体力；2.对其攻击范围内至多X名角色各造成1点伤害。（X为你给出的牌数）
skill_xianzhou.description_en: Limited Skill: Give all equipment to another. They either: 1. Let you recover X health; 2. Damage X targets in range (X = cards given).

skill_qieting.description_cn: 其他角色的回合结束后，若其本回合未对其他角色造成伤害，你可以选择一项；若其本回合未对其他角色使用过牌，你可以选择两项；1.将其装备区里的一张牌置入你的装备区；2.摸一张牌。
skill_qieting.description_en: End of another's turn: If they dealt no damage, choose 1 (if no cards used, choose 2): 1. Take their equipment; 2. Draw 1 card.

skill_chengxiang.description_cn: 当你受到伤害后，你可以亮出牌堆顶的四张牌，然后你获得其中的任意张点数之和不大于13的牌。
skill_chengxiang.description_en: After taking damage, reveal top 4 cards. Gain any that sum up to <= 13 points.

skill_renxin.description_cn: 当其他角色受到伤害时，若该角色的体力值为1，则你可以翻面并弃置一张装备牌，然后防止此伤害。
skill_renxin.description_en: When a 1-health character takes damage, flip over and discard equipment to prevent it.

skill_ganlu.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以令两名角色交换装备区里的牌。若X大于你已损失的体力值，你须在选择角色时弃置X张牌（X为其装备区里的牌数之差）。
skill_ganlu.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Swap equipment between 2 characters. Discard cards equal to the difference in equipment count if it exceeds your lost health.

skill_buyi.description_cn: 当一名角色进入濒死状态时，你可以选择其一张牌，若此牌不为基本牌，则其弃置此牌，然后回复1点体力。
skill_buyi.description_en: When a character is dying, choose 1 of their cards. If not basic, they discard it and recover 1 health.

skill_mieji.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以将一张锦囊牌置于牌堆顶并令一名有手牌的其他角色选择一项：1.弃置一张锦囊牌；2.依次弃置两张牌。
skill_mieji.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Put a tactic on top of the deck. Target either discards a tactic or discards 2 cards.

skill_fencheng.description_cn: 限定技，出牌阶段，你可以选择一名其他角色开始，令所有其他角色依次选择一项：1.弃置任意张牌（须比上家弃置的牌多）；2.受到你造成的2点火焰伤害。
skill_fencheng.description_en: Limited Skill: Starting from target, all others must discard more cards than the previous person or take 2 fire damage.

skill_juece.description_cn: 结束阶段，你可以对一名手牌数小于等于你的其他角色造成一点伤害。
skill_juece.description_en: End Phase: Deal 1 damage to a character with fewer or equal hand cards as you.

skill_zhuikong.description_cn: 其他角色的回合开始时，若你已受伤，你可以与其拼点：若你赢，其本回合不能对除其以外的角色使用牌；若你没赢，你获得其拼点牌，然后其视为对你使用一张【杀】。
skill_zhuikong.description_en: Start of another's turn (if injured): Pindian. Win: they can't play cards on others. Lose: you gain their card but they [Kill] you.

skill_qiuyuan.description_cn: 当你成为【杀】或伤害锦囊的目标时，你可以令另一名其他角色选择一项：1.交给你一张与此牌同类型不同牌名的牌；2.成为此牌的额外目标。
skill_qiuyuan.description_en: When targeted by [Kill] or damage tactic: Another character either gives you a same-type card or becomes an extra target.

skill_gongqi.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以弃置一张牌使你本回合攻击范围无限，且你使用与弃置的牌花色相同的【杀】无次数限制。若弃置的牌为装备牌，你可以弃置一名其他角色一张牌。
skill_gongqi.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Discard 1 to have infinite range and unlimited same-suit [Kill]. If equipment, discard 1 card from another character.

skill_jiefan.description_cn: 限定技，出牌阶段，你可以选择一名角色，令所有攻击范围内包含其的角色选择一项：1.弃置一张武器牌；2.令该角色摸一张牌。若此时为第一轮，回合结束时，此技能视为未发动过。
skill_jiefan.description_en: Limited Skill: Choose a character; everyone in range of them must discard a weapon or let them draw 1.

skill_zishou.description_cn: 摸牌阶段，你可以多摸X张牌，你以此法摸牌的结束阶段，若你本回合对其他角色造成过伤害，你弃置X张牌（X为全场势力数）。
skill_zishou.description_en: Draw Phase: Draw +X (factions count). If you dealt damage this turn, discard X cards at End Phase.

skill_zongshi_jie.description_cn: 锁定技，你的手牌上限+X（X为全场势力数）。其他角色对你造成伤害时，防止此伤害改为令其摸一张牌，每种势力限一次。
skill_zongshi_jie.description_en: Locked Skill: Hand limit +X (factions count). Prevent first damage from each faction; attacker draws 1 instead.

skill_luoying.description_cn: 当其他角色的梅花牌因弃置或判定而置入弃牌堆后，你可以获得其中任意张牌。
skill_luoying.description_en: Gain discarded or judged Club cards from others.

skill_jiushi.description_cn: 你可以将武将牌翻至背面，视为使用一张【酒】。若你的武将牌背面朝上，你使用的“落英”牌无距离限制且不能被响应。当你受到伤害后，或回合外累计获得至少X张“落英”牌后（X为你体力值上限），若你的武将牌背面朝上，你可以翻至正面。
skill_jiushi.description_en: Flip over to use [Wine]. While flipped, 'Luoying' cards have no range limit and are unavoidable. Flip back after damage or gaining X cards.

skill_dangxian.description_cn: 回合开始时，你执行一个额外的出牌阶段。此阶段开始时，你可以从牌堆或弃牌堆中获得一张无距离限制的【杀】，然后若你未于此阶段造成过伤害，阶段结束时你对自己造成1点伤害。
skill_dangxian.description_en: Start of turn: Take an extra Action Phase. Gain a rangeless [Kill]; if no damage dealt, take 1 damage at phase end.

skill_fuli.description_cn: 限定技，当你处于濒死状态时，你可以将体力回复至X点且手牌摸至X张（X为全场势力数）。然后若X大于你造成的伤害数，你翻面。
skill_fuli.description_en: Limited Skill (Near Death): Recover health and cards to X (factions count). Flip over if X > damage dealt.

skill_zhenlie.description_cn: 当你成为其他角色【杀】或普通锦囊牌的目标后，你可以失去1点体力令此牌对你无效，然后你可以选择一项：1.获得使用者一张牌；2.本回合结束阶段，发动一次“秘计”。
skill_zhenlie.description_en: When targeted by [Kill] or tactic, lose 1 health to negate it. Either take 1 of their cards or trigger 'Miji' at End Phase.

skill_miji.description_cn: 结束阶段，你可以摸X张牌（X为你已损失的体力值），然后你可以交给其他角色至多X张牌。
skill_miji.description_en: End Phase: Draw X cards and give up to X to others (X = lost health).

skill_jingce.description_cn: 你每于回合内使用一种花色的手牌，本回合的手牌上限便+1；每个出牌阶段结束时，你可以摸X张牌（X为你本回合使用过牌的类型数）。
skill_jingce.description_en: Hand limit +1 per suit used. End of Action Phase: Draw X cards (X = card types used).

skill_fuhun.description_cn: 你可将两张牌当【杀】使用或打出。你使用的转化【杀】目标角色只能使用颜色相同的手牌响应；你于出牌阶段使用【杀】造成伤害后，你本回合获得“武圣”“咆哮”。
skill_fuhun.description_en: Use 2 cards as [Kill]. Target must respond with same-colored cards. Damaging with [Kill] grants 'Wusheng' and 'Paoxiao' for the turn.

skill_qianxi.description_cn: 准备阶段，你可以摸一张牌并展示一张牌。若如此做，距离为1的其他角色本回合不能使用或打出与“潜袭”牌颜色相同的手牌，你本回合使用“潜袭”牌造成的伤害+1。
skill_qianxi.description_en: Preparation Phase: Draw and show 1 card. Nearby characters can't use/play same-colored cards; your cards deal +1 damage to them.

skill_shibei.description_cn: 锁定技，游戏开始时，你获得3点护甲。当你每回合首次受到伤害后，你回复1点体力，然后当你本回合再受到伤害后，你失去1点体力。
skill_shibei.description_en: Locked Skill: Start with 3 armor. Recover 1 health after first damage of turn; lose 1 health for subsequent damage.

skill_jianying.description_cn: 当你于出牌阶段使用牌时，若此牌与你于此阶段使用的上一张牌花色或点数相同，则你可以摸一张牌。出牌阶段限一次，你可以将一张牌当做任意一张基本牌使用，若你于本阶段使用的上一张牌有花色，则此牌的花色视为与上一张牌的花色相同。
skill_jianying.description_en: Draw 1 if card suit/point matches previous one. Once per turn: play 1 card as any basic, matching the previous card's suit.

skill_zhenjun.description_cn:
准备阶段，你可以弃置一名角色X张牌（X为其手牌数减体力值且至少为1)，然后选择一项：
 1.你弃置与其中非装备牌数等量张牌；
 2.结束阶段，其摸与其中非装备牌数等量张牌。
skill_zhenjun.description_en: Preparation Phase: Discard X cards from someone (X = hand - health). Either discard same amount of non-equipment or let them draw that amount at End Phase.

skill_yizhong.description_cn: 锁定技，体力值大于等于你的角色的黑色【杀】对你无效；手牌数小于等于你的角色无法响应你的黑色【杀】。
skill_yizhong.description_en: Locked Skill: Black [Kill] from those with health >= yours is null; those with hand cards <= yours can't dodge your black [Kill].

skill_mo_fuzai.description_cn: 锁定技，你的装备牌只能当【借刀杀人】或【无中生有】使用。若你的装备区里没有牌，你视为装备着攻击范围为X的武器牌和牌名字数为X的防具牌各随机一张（X为你的体力值；若无对应则完全随机一张）。
skill_mo_fuzai.description_en: Locked: Your equipment cards can only be used as [Proxy Attack] or [Resupply]. If your equipment zone is empty, you are treated as having equipped a random weapon with attack range X and a random armor whose name has X characters (X = your current HP; if no matching equipment exists, a completely random one is used).

skill_mo_bachao.description_cn: 出牌阶段开始时，你可以令所有其他角色同时选择是否交给你一张牌，然后你可以对未以此法交给你非基本牌的一名角色造成1点伤害。若你选择自己，本阶段你使用当前手牌无次数和距离限制，并入魔。
skill_mo_bachao.description_en: At the start of your Play Phase: you may have all other characters simultaneously choose whether to give you a card. You may then deal 1 damage to one character who did not give you a non-basic card this way. If you choose yourself, during this phase your current hand cards have no frequency or distance restrictions, and you Demonize.

skill_mo_guifu.description_cn: 每轮开始时或你体力值变化后，你获得一张不计入手牌上限的【闪】。技能或牌造成伤害后，你记录此技能或牌名。你可将因此技能获得的【闪】当做记录的牌名使用（不计入次数限制，每回合每种牌名限一次）。
skill_mo_guifu.description_en: At the start of each round or when your HP changes, gain one [Dodge] that does not count toward your hand limit. When a skill or card deals damage, record that skill or card name. You may use [Dodge] cards gained from this skill as any recorded card name (does not count toward frequency limits; once per card name per turn).

skill_mo_moubian.description_cn: 准备阶段，若你【诡伏】记录数至少为3，你可入魔，获得你【诡伏】记录的技能，并获得【骤袭】。入魔后，每轮结束时，若本轮你未造成过伤害，你失去1点体力。
skill_mo_moubian.description_en: Preparation Phase: If the total number of entries recorded by [Ambuscade] is at least 3, you may Demonize — gain all skills recorded by [Ambuscade] and gain [Onslaught]. While Demonized: at the end of each round, if you dealt no damage this round, lose 1 HP.

skill_mo_zhouxi.description_cn: 准备阶段，你从三个可造成伤害的技能中选择一个获得至你的下回合开始。受到你伤害的角色于本轮结束时视为对你使用一张【杀】。
skill_mo_zhouxi.description_en: Preparation Phase: Choose one of three damage-dealing skills to gain until the start of your next turn. At the end of this round, each character who took damage from you this round is treated as using a [Kill] against you.

skill_mo_duoqi.description_cn: 锁定技，一号位首个回合开始前，你执行一个不能使用延时锦囊牌的额外出牌阶段。所有角色的初始手牌称为炁。你每回合对一名角色首次造成伤害后，你获得其一张炁。
skill_mo_duoqi.description_en: Locked: Before the first player's first turn begins, you take an extra Play Phase in which delayed tool cards cannot be used. All characters' starting hand cards are called [Qi]. The first time you deal damage to a character each turn, gain one of their [Qi].

skill_mo_kuangmo.description_cn: 出牌阶段，你可以入魔并选择一名其他角色，你与其成为狂角色，每回合对彼此首次造成的伤害+1；击败对方后，获得对方所有炁。狂角色死亡后，你重新指定。入魔后，每轮结束时，若本轮你未造成过伤害，你失去1点体力。
skill_mo_kuangmo.description_en: Play Phase: You may Demonize and choose another character. You and that character become Frenzied: the first damage dealt between you each turn is increased by 1; upon defeating them, gain all their [Qi]. When the Frenzied character dies, you must designate a new one. While Demonized: at the end of each round, if you dealt no damage this round, lose 1 HP.

skill_mo_gangquan.description_cn: 若你使用的上一张牌为炁，你可以将一张装备牌当指定相邻角色为目标的火【杀】使用；否则，你可以将一张锦囊牌当【决斗】使用。
skill_mo_gangquan.description_en: If the last card you played was a [Qi] card, you may use an equipment card as a [Fire Kill] targeting an adjacent character; otherwise, you may use a tool card as a [Duel].

skill_mo_huanhuo.description_cn: 每轮开始时，你摸两张牌，然后弃置至多两张牌并选择等量其他角色。其下回合出牌阶段强制选中一张可用的手牌，且每使用一张牌后随机弃一张牌，直到其使用了两张牌后。
skill_mo_huanhuo.description_en: At the start of each round, draw 2 cards, then discard up to 2 cards and choose an equal number of other characters. During their next Play Phase, one usable hand card is forcibly selected; after each card they play, they randomly discard one card, until they have played 2 cards total.

skill_mo_qingshi.description_cn: 准备阶段，你可入魔，令所有角色获得一张单目标伤害牌。其他角色使用此牌指定唯一目标时，你可弃置一张牌，重新指定牌的目标（无距离限制）。这些牌：造成伤害后，你摸一张牌；未因使用进入弃牌堆后，你获得之。（准备阶段，若这些牌均离开其手牌区，你再令所有角色获得牌。）入魔后，每轮结束时，若本轮你未造成过伤害，你失去1点体力。
skill_mo_qingshi.description_en: Preparation Phase: You may Demonize — give all characters one single-target damage card. When another character uses this card with only one target, you may discard a card to redirect it (no distance restriction). These cards: when one deals damage, you draw 1 card; if one leaves play without being used, you gain it. (Preparation Phase: if all these cards have left their holders' hands, give all characters another one.) While Demonized: at the end of each round, if you dealt no damage this round, lose 1 HP.

skill_god_war_god.description_cn: 锁定技，你的红桃手牌视为【杀】。你的红桃【杀】无距离和次数限制且不能被抵消。
skill_god_war_god.description_en: Locked: Your Heart hand cards are treated as [Kill]. Your Heart [Kill] has no distance or frequency limit and cannot be negated.

skill_god_war_soul.description_cn: 锁定技，当你受到1点伤害后，你令伤害来源获得1枚「梦魇」标记。当你死亡时，你令「梦魇」数最多的一名其他角色判定，若结果不为【桃】或【桃园结义】，你令其死亡。
skill_god_war_soul.description_en: Locked: When you take 1 damage, give the damage source 1 Nightmare token. When you die, the character with the most Nightmare tokens makes a judgment; if the result is not [Peach] or [Peach Garden Oath], that character dies.

skill_god_wide_reading.description_cn: 摸牌阶段，你可以改为亮出牌堆顶的五张牌，然后获得每种花色的牌各一张。
skill_god_wide_reading.description_en: During your draw phase, you may instead reveal the top 5 cards of the deck and take one card of each suit.

skill_god_mental_attack.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以观看一名其他角色的手牌，然后你可以展示其中一张红桃牌并选择一项：1.弃置此牌；2.将此牌置于牌堆顶。
skill_god_mental_attack.description_en: Once per Play Phase: View another character's hand cards. You may reveal one Heart card and choose: 1. Discard it; 2. Place it on top of the deck.

skill_god_zither_melody.description_cn: 弃牌阶段结束时，若你本阶段弃置过至少两张手牌，你可以选择令所有角色：1.各回复1点体力；2.各失去1点体力。
skill_god_zither_melody.description_en: At the end of your discard phase, if you discarded at least 2 hand cards this phase, choose: all characters 1. each recover 1 HP; or 2. each lose 1 HP.

skill_god_raging_flames.description_cn: 限定技，出牌阶段，你可以选择至多三名角色，对其造成共计至多3点火焰伤害。若你将对一名角色分配至少2点伤害，你须先弃置四张花色各不相同的手牌并失去3点体力。
skill_god_raging_flames.description_en: Limited: During your Play Phase, choose up to 3 characters and deal them a combined total of up to 3 Fire damage. To assign 2 or more damage to a single character, you must first discard 4 cards of different suits and lose 3 HP.

skill_god_seven_stars.description_cn: 游戏开始时，你将牌堆顶的七张牌暗置于你的武将牌上，称为「星」，然后你可以用任意张手牌替换等量「星」。摸牌阶段结束时，你可以用任意张手牌替换等量「星」。
skill_god_seven_stars.description_en: At game start, place the top 7 deck cards face-down on your general card as Stars. You may swap any number of hand cards with an equal number of Stars. At the end of your draw phase, you may again swap any number of hand cards with an equal number of Stars.

skill_god_gale.description_cn: 结束阶段，你可以移去一张「星」并选择一名角色，然后直到你的下回合开始，当其受到火焰伤害时，此伤害+1。
skill_god_gale.description_en: During your end phase, remove 1 Star and choose a character. Until your next turn begins, Fire damage that character takes is increased by 1.

skill_god_great_fog.description_cn: 结束阶段，你可以移去任意张「星」并选择等量角色，然后直到你的下回合开始，当其受到非雷电伤害时，防止此伤害。
skill_god_great_fog.description_en: During your end phase, remove any number of Stars and choose an equal number of characters. Until your next turn begins, non-Lightning damage those characters take is prevented.

skill_god_rallying_hearts.description_cn: 当你受到1点伤害后，你可以随机获得每名其他角色区域里的一张牌，然后翻面。
skill_god_rallying_hearts.description_en: When you take 1 damage, you may randomly take 1 card from each other character's area, then flip your general card.

skill_god_shadow_flight.description_cn: 锁定技，其他角色计算与你的距离+1。
skill_god_shadow_flight.description_en: Locked: Other characters calculate their distance to you as +1.

skill_god_berserk_rage.description_cn: 锁定技，游戏开始时，你获得2枚「暴怒」标记。当你造成或受到1点伤害后，你获得1枚「暴怒」标记。
skill_god_berserk_rage.description_en: Locked: At game start, gain 2 Fury tokens. After you deal or take 1 damage, gain 1 Fury token.

skill_god_recklessness.description_cn: 锁定技，当你使用普通锦囊牌时，你移除1枚「暴怒」标记或失去1点体力。
skill_god_recklessness.description_en: Locked: When you use a standard Tool card, remove 1 Fury token or lose 1 HP.

skill_god_unstoppable.description_cn: 出牌阶段，你可以移除2枚「暴怒」标记并选择一名其他角色，然后你本回合获得「无双」且其防具失效。
skill_god_unstoppable.description_en: During your Play Phase, remove 2 Fury tokens and choose a character. This turn you gain Peerless and their equipped armor becomes ineffective.

skill_god_divine_fury.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以移除6枚「暴怒」标记，对所有其他角色各造成1点伤害，令这些角色先各弃置装备区里的所有牌，再弃置四张手牌，然后你翻面。
skill_god_divine_fury.description_en: Once per Play Phase: Remove 6 Fury tokens. Deal 1 damage to all other characters. They each discard all equipment, then discard 4 hand cards. You then flip your general card.

skill_god_desperate_stand.description_cn: 锁定技，你的手牌上限+2。当你进入或脱离濒死状态时，你摸一张牌。
skill_god_desperate_stand.description_en: Locked: Your hand card limit +2. When you enter or leave the Dying state, draw 1 card.

skill_god_dragon_soul.description_cn: 你可以将至多两张花色相同的牌按以下规则使用或打出：红桃当【桃】；方片当火【杀】；梅花当【闪】；黑桃当【无懈可击】。若你以此法转化使用了两张：红色牌，此牌回复值或伤害值+1；黑色牌，你弃置当前回合角色一张牌。
skill_god_dragon_soul.description_en: You may use or play up to 2 cards of the same suit as follows: Hearts as [Peach]; Diamonds as [Fire Kill]; Clubs as [Dodge]; Spades as [Nullification]. If you convert 2 cards this way -- red cards: the recovery or damage value +1; black cards: discard 1 card from the current turn player.

skill_god_endurance_vow.description_cn: 锁定技，当你受到伤害后或于弃牌阶段内因弃置而失去手牌后，你获得X枚「忍」标记（X为此伤害值或你此次弃置的手牌数）。
skill_god_endurance_vow.description_en: Locked: After you take damage or lose hand cards by discarding during your discard phase, gain X Patience tokens (X = the damage value or the number of cards discarded).

skill_god_chain_conquest.description_cn: 每名角色的回合结束时，若你于此回合内杀死过角色，你可以于此回合结束后执行一个额外的回合。
skill_god_chain_conquest.description_en: At the end of each character's turn, if you killed a character this turn, you may take an extra turn after this turn ends.

skill_god_claim_the_seal.description_cn: 觉醒技，准备阶段，若「忍」标记数量不小于4，你减1点体力上限，然后获得「极略」（你可以于能发动技能「鬼才」、「放逐」、「集智」、「制衡」的时机弃1枚「忍」，然后发动一次相应技能；出牌阶段，你可以弃1枚「忍」，然后你于此回合内拥有「完杀」）。
skill_god_claim_the_seal.description_en: Awakening: During your prepare phase, if you have 4 or more Patience tokens, reduce your max HP by 1 and gain Grand Strategy. (Grand Strategy: At any timing when you could use Ghost Talent, Exile, Gather Wisdom, or Balance, spend 1 Patience token to use that skill. During your Play Phase, spend 1 Patience token to gain Total Kill for this turn.)

skill_god_dragon_fury.description_cn: 转换技，锁定技，出牌阶段开始时，阳：你失去1点体力并摸一张牌，然后本阶段你的红色手牌均视为火【杀】且无距离限制；阴：你减少1点体力上限并摸一张牌，然后本阶段你的锦囊牌均视为雷【杀】且无次数限制。
skill_god_dragon_fury.description_en: Convert/Locked: At the start of your Play Phase -- Yang: lose 1 HP and draw 1 card; your red hand cards are treated as [Fire Kill] with no distance limit this phase. Yin: reduce max HP by 1 and draw 1 card; your Tool cards are treated as [Lightning Kill] with no frequency limit this phase.

skill_god_entrenched_camp.description_cn: 锁定技，你始终处于连环状态。所有连环状态的角色手牌上限+2。结束阶段，你令一名其他角色进入连环状态。
skill_god_entrenched_camp.description_en: Locked: You are always in Chain status. All Chained characters' hand card limits +2. During your end phase, put one other character into Chain status.

skill_god_military_stratagem.description_cn: 锁定技，当你受到或造成1点伤害后，你获得1枚「军略」标记。
skill_god_military_stratagem.description_en: Locked: After you deal or take 1 damage, gain 1 Stratagem token.

skill_god_crushing_advance.description_cn: 出牌阶段开始时，若「军略」数：为奇数，你可以对一名角色造成1点伤害；为偶数，你可以弃置一名角色区域里一张牌并令其进入连环状态。然后若大于7，你可以移除所有「军略」并对所有其他角色造成1点伤害。
skill_god_crushing_advance.description_en: At the start of your Play Phase, if Stratagem count is odd -- deal 1 damage to a character; if even -- discard 1 card from a character's area and Chain them. Then if count exceeds 7, remove all Stratagem tokens and deal 1 damage to all other characters.

skill_god_blaze_of_fire.description_cn: 限定技，出牌阶段，你可以移除所有「军略」，令至多等量的连环状态角色弃置所有装备区里的牌，然后对其中一名角色造成1点火焰伤害。
skill_god_blaze_of_fire.description_en: Limited: During your Play Phase, remove all Stratagem tokens. Up to that many Chained characters discard all their equipment. Deal 1 Fire damage to one of those characters.

skill_god_skill_seizure.description_cn: 当你于出牌阶段内对一名其他角色造成伤害后，你可以废除你的一个装备栏，然后你选择其武将牌上的一个技能（除限定、觉醒、主公、隐匿技外），令其此技能于其下个回合结束之前无效，你于其下个回合结束或其死亡前拥有此技能且不能发动「夺锐」。
skill_god_skill_seizure.description_en: After dealing damage to a character during your Play Phase, you may destroy one of your equipment slots. Then choose one skill on that character's general card (excluding Limited, Awakening, Lord, and Hidden skills). That skill is disabled until the end of their next turn; you gain that skill until then (or until they die) and cannot use Skill Seizure again during that time.

skill_god_intimidation.description_cn: 锁定技，你攻击范围内已受伤的其他角色的手牌上限-1；当符合下列任意一项时机条件，若你有已废除的装备栏，你选择其中一个装备栏恢复：1.当你因【决斗】效果对你攻击范围内已受伤的其他角色造成伤害时；2.当你与你攻击范围内已受伤的其他角色的拼点结果确定后，若结果为你赢；3.当你受到你攻击范围内已受伤的其他角色对你造成伤害后。
skill_god_intimidation.description_en: Locked: Injured characters within your attack range have their hand card limit -1. Whenever any of the following occurs and you have a destroyed equipment slot, restore one destroyed slot: 1. You deal damage to an injured character in your attack range via [Duel]; 2. You win a showdown against an injured character in your attack range; 3. You take damage from an injured character within your attack range.

skill_god_soul_raid.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以观看一名其他角色的手牌并可以弃置你与其手牌中共计四张不同花色的牌，若如此做，你根据弃置牌中你的牌的数量执行效果：0张，减少1点体力上限；1张，结束出牌阶段且本回合手牌上限-1；3张，回复1点体力；4张，摸四张牌。
skill_god_soul_raid.description_en: Once per Play Phase: View a character's hand cards. You may discard a combined total of 4 cards of different suits from yours and theirs. Effect based on how many discarded cards were yours -- 0: reduce your max HP by 1; 1: end Play Phase and hand limit -1 this turn; 3: recover 1 HP; 4: draw 4 cards.

skill_god_camp_raid.description_cn: 回合开始时，若场上没有「营」标记，你获得「营」。结束阶段，你可以将「营」置于一名角色的武将牌上。有「营」的角色摸牌阶段多摸一张牌、出牌阶段使用【杀】的限制次数+1、手牌上限+1。有「营」的其他角色回合结束后，你获得其所有手牌和「营」。
skill_god_camp_raid.description_en: At the start of your turn, if no Camp token is in play, gain Camp. During your end phase, you may place Camp on a character's general card. The Camp character draws +1 per draw phase, uses [Kill] +1 per Play Phase, and has hand limit +1. After their turn ends, take all their hand cards and Camp.

skill_god_soul_lure.description_cn: 结束阶段或当你成为【杀】的目标后，你可以令一名其他角色交给一张你声明花色的牌，若其没有则你观看其手牌然后弃置其中一张。
skill_god_soul_lure.description_en: During your End Phase, or after you become the target of a [Kill], you may ask one other character to give you one card of a suit you declare. If they have no card of that suit, you view their hand and discard one card from it.

skill_god_bewitching_heart.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以展示两张花色相同的牌并分别交给两名其他角色，然后令这两名角色拼点，没赢的角色获得1个「魅惑」标记。拥有2个或更多「魅惑」的角色回合即将开始时，该角色移去其所有「魅惑」，此回合改为由你操控。
skill_god_bewitching_heart.description_en: Once per Play Phase, you may reveal two cards of the same suit and give one to each of two different characters, then make those two characters compete in a showdown. The character who does not win gains 1 Bewitch token. When a character with 2 or more Bewitch tokens is about to begin their turn, that character removes all their Bewitch tokens and you take control of their turn instead.

skill_god_five_spirits.description_cn: 出牌阶段限两次，你可以选择一名未拥有「五灵」标记的角色，按照你指定的顺序向其传授「五禽戏」。拥有「五灵」标记的角色拥有按照你指定的效果，并在准备阶段切换为下一种。虎灵：若你使用的牌仅指定唯一目标，则此牌对目标角色造成伤害时，此伤害+1。鹤灵：拥有「鹤」标记的角色获得「鹤」标记时，摸三张牌。熊灵：每回合限一次，你受到伤害时，此伤害-1。猿灵：拥有「猿」标记的角色获得「猿」标记时，选择另一名角色，获得其装备区的一张牌。鹿灵：你获得「鹿」标记时，回复1点体力，移除判定区所有牌。你不能成为延时锦囊目标。
skill_god_five_spirits.description_en: Twice per Play Phase: Choose a character without a Five Spirits token and assign them the Five Animals Exercise in your chosen order. The character gains the current active effect and switches to the next during their prepare phase. Tiger: if your card targets only one character, damage dealt +1. Crane: when the Crane character gains a Crane token, draw 3 cards. Bear: once per turn, damage you take -1. Ape: when the Ape character gains an Ape token, take 1 equipment from another character. Deer: when you gain a Deer token, recover 1 HP and remove all cards from your judgment area; you cannot be targeted by Delayed Tool cards.

skill_god_traveling_physician.description_cn: 弃牌阶段结束时，你可以将此阶段弃置的牌置入「仁」区。出牌阶段限一次，你可以弃置所有「仁」区的牌，令所有角色回复1点体力。
skill_god_traveling_physician.description_en: At the end of your discard phase, you may place cards discarded this phase into the Benevolence area. Once per Play Phase: discard all Benevolence area cards; all characters recover 1 HP.

skill_god_soul_refinement.description_cn: 锁定技，若场上最大阵营为反贼、其他角色的手牌上限-1，所有角色使用【杀】的次数和攻击范围+1，主忠、其他角色不能对其以外的角色使用【桃】。若有多个最大阵营，其他角色死亡后，杀死其的角色摸两张牌或回复1点体力；每轮开始时，你展示一张未加入游戏或死亡角色的身份牌，本轮该阵营角色数视为+1。
skill_god_soul_refinement.description_en: Locked: While the largest faction is Rebel — all other characters' hand card limits are -1, all characters' [Kill] frequency and attack range are +1, and Lord/Loyalist characters cannot use [Peach] on anyone but you. If there are multiple tied largest factions, whenever another character dies the killer draws 2 cards or recovers 1 HP. At the start of each round, reveal one role card from outside the game or from a dead character; that faction's count is treated as +1 for this round.

skill_god_omen_of_chaos.description_cn: 限定技，一名角色的濒死结算完成后，若其未脱离濒死状态，你可以令其增加3点体力上限并失去所有非锁定技，然后其将体力回复至3点并摸四张牌，本局游戏你可以令其减少1点体力上限并对一名你选择的角色造成1点伤害（出牌阶段每名角色限一次）。
skill_god_omen_of_chaos.description_en: Limited: After a near-death resolution completes for a character who has not escaped death, you may increase their max HP by 3, remove all their non-Locked skills, restore their HP to 3, and let them draw 4 cards. For the rest of the game you may, once per character per Play Phase, reduce their max HP by 1 to deal 1 damage to a character of your choice.

skill_god_sacrifice_armor.description_cn: 锁定技，游戏开始时，你废除防具栏并获得一个额外的武器栏。
skill_god_sacrifice_armor.description_en: Locked: At game start, destroy your armor slot and gain an extra weapon slot.

skill_god_carry_generals.description_cn: 锁定技，准备阶段，你从随机五张武将牌中选择任意张当武器牌置于装备区，此类牌：无花色点数、攻击范围为牌上的体力上限、效果为牌上描述中含有【杀】的技能（觉醒技、限定技、转换技、主公技除外）、离开装备区时销毁。
skill_god_carry_generals.description_en: Locked: During your prepare phase, choose any number of cards from 5 randomly drawn general cards to place in your equipment zone as weapon cards. These cards have no suit or value; their attack range equals the max HP on that general card; their effect is any skill on that card containing [Kill] (excluding Awakening, Limited, Convert, and Lord skills); they are destroyed when they leave the equipment zone.

skill_god_crushing_strike.description_cn: 出牌阶段，你可以弃置一张牌，然后对一名攻击范围内距离最远的其他角色造成1点伤害，每名角色每回合限一次。
skill_god_crushing_strike.description_en: During your Play Phase, discard 1 card to deal 1 damage to the farthest character within your attack range. Once per character per turn.

skill_god_longbed_strategy.description_cn: （身份场）游戏开始时，你可以重新分配除主公外每名角色的座次。（斗地主）游戏开始时，你可以重新分配三号位以外的角色的座次。
skill_god_longbed_strategy.description_en: (Identity mode) At game start, you may reassign seating positions for all characters except the Lord. (Landlord mode) You may reassign seating for all characters except seat 3.

skill_god_claim_the_province.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你交给一名角色X张牌（X为其场上牌的张数），然后你获得其场上的所有牌。
skill_god_claim_the_province.description_en: Once per Play Phase: Give a character X cards (X = number of cards in their play area), then take all cards from their play area.

skill_god_alliance_of_wisdom.description_cn: （身份场）你的回合结束后，你可以选择一名其他角色，你与其随机平均分配双方手牌（若为奇数则你分配较多张数）。（斗地主、团战类）你的回合结束后，你可选择一名手牌数不大于x的其他角色（x为你的手牌数+1），你与其随机平均分配双方手牌（若为奇数则你分配较多张数）。
skill_god_alliance_of_wisdom.description_en: (Identity mode) After your turn ends, choose another character and randomly redistribute both your hand cards evenly; you keep the extra if odd. (Landlord/Team mode) After your turn ends, choose a character with hand cards not exceeding your count +1 and redistribute both hands evenly; you keep the extra if odd.

skill_god_balance_of_power.description_cn: 锁定技，回合开始时，你弃置任意张花色不同的牌，随机获得等量吴势力武将的技能。回合结束时，你失去以此法获得的技能，摸等量张牌。
skill_god_balance_of_power.description_en: Locked: At the start of your turn, discard any number of cards of different suits and randomly gain an equal number of Wu-faction generals' skills. At the end of your turn, lose those skills and draw that many cards.

skill_god_imperial_will.description_cn: 觉醒技，当你的技能数超过体力上限后，你减少1点体力上限，失去任意个其他技能并获得「圣质」「权道」「持纲」中的前等量个。
skill_god_imperial_will.description_en: Awakening: When your skill count exceeds your max HP, reduce max HP by 1, lose any number of other skills, and gain the first matching number of skills among: Sacred Essence, Sovereign Path, and Uphold Order.

skill_god_heavens_aid.description_cn: 锁定技，游戏开始时，将8张【奇正相生※】加入牌堆。【奇正相生】对你无效。
skill_god_heavens_aid.description_en: Locked: At game start, add 8 [Qizheng Xiangsheng] cards to the deck. [Qizheng Xiangsheng] has no effect on you.

skill_god_spirit_strategy.description_cn: 锁定技。一名角色使用非虚拟非转化的锦囊牌时，若此牌的牌名属于智囊牌名、「定汉」已记录的牌名或【奇正相生※】时，你摸一张牌。
skill_god_spirit_strategy.description_en: Locked: When a character uses a non-virtual non-converted Tool card, if its name matches a Wisdom card name, a name recorded in Grand Pacification, or [Qizheng Xiangsheng], draw 1 card.

skill_god_grand_pacification.description_cn: 每种牌名限一次，你成为锦囊牌的目标时，你记录此牌名，然后取消之。你的回合开始时，你可以在「定汉」记录中，增加或移除一种锦囊牌牌名。
skill_god_grand_pacification.description_en: Once per card name: when you become the target of a Tool card, record that card name and cancel its effect on you. At the start of your turn, you may add or remove one Tool card name from your Grand Pacification record.

skill_god_astute_insight.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，若你体力上限小于10，你可进行一次判定：若判定结果与本阶段内以此法进行判定的判定结果花色均不相同，且此时你体力上限小于10，你可以重复此判定并增加1点体力上限。然后你可以将所有生效的判定牌交给任意一名角色。然后若其手牌数为全场最多，你减少1点体力上限。
skill_god_astute_insight.description_en: Once per Play Phase: If your max HP is below 10, make a judgment. If the result is a different suit from all prior judgments this phase, and your max HP is still below 10, repeat and increase max HP by 1 each time. Then you may give all activated judgment cards to any one character. If that character then has the most hand cards in play, reduce your max HP by 1.

skill_god_heavenly_soar.description_cn: 觉醒技，准备阶段，若所有存活的角色在本局游戏内均受到过伤害，你增加2点体力上限，回复1点体力，然后令一名角色获得技能「佐幸※」。
skill_god_heavenly_soar.description_en: Awakening: During your prepare phase, if all surviving characters have taken damage this game, increase your max HP by 2, recover 1 HP, then grant one character the skill Blessing.

skill_god_radiant_passage.description_cn: 限定技，出牌阶段，你可选择一名角色：若其有未触发的觉醒技，且你体力上限不小于X（X为场上存活人数），则你选择其中一个觉醒技，其视为已满足觉醒条件；否则其摸四张牌。若如此做，你减少2点体力上限。
skill_god_radiant_passage.description_en: Limited: During your Play Phase, choose a character. If they have an untriggered Awakening skill and your max HP is at least equal to the number of survivors, choose one of their Awakening skills and they are treated as having met its condition. Otherwise they draw 4 cards. Either way, reduce your max HP by 2.

skill_god_heroic_dominance.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以选择一名体力值上限大于1的其他角色，令其减少1点体力值上限并获得「平定」标记，然后你减少1点体力值上限。你对拥有「平定」标记的角色使用牌没有距离限制。
skill_god_heroic_dominance.description_en: Once per Play Phase: Choose a character with max HP greater than 1. They reduce their max HP by 1 and gain a Pacify token; you reduce your max HP by 1. You have no distance restriction when using cards against Pacified characters.

skill_god_sea_overturned.description_cn: 锁定技，拥有「平定」标记的角色不能响应你对其使用的牌。你使用牌指定有「平定」标记的角色为目标时，若本回合你以此法获得的牌少于两张，你摸一张牌。拥有「平定」标记的角色死亡时，你增加X点体力值上限并摸X张牌（X为其拥有的「平定」标记数）。
skill_god_sea_overturned.description_en: Locked: Pacified characters cannot respond to cards you use against them. When you target a Pacified character, if you have gained fewer than 2 cards this way this turn, draw 1 card. When a Pacified character dies, increase your max HP by X and draw X cards (X = their Pacify token count).

skill_god_ford_crossing.description_cn: 锁定技，你的手牌数上限等于已损失体力值。当你受到其他角色造成的伤害时，若你有手牌且体力上限大于1，则防止本次伤害，然后减少1点体力值上限并将1张手牌交给一名其他角色，然后若你拥有技能「英霸」，令伤害来源获得1个「平定」标记。
skill_god_ford_crossing.description_en: Locked: Your hand card limit equals your lost HP. When another character deals damage to you, if you have hand cards and your max HP is greater than 1, prevent the damage, reduce your max HP by 1, give 1 hand card to a character, and if you have Heroic Dominance, give the damage source 1 Pacify token.

skill_god_steadfast_valor.description_cn: 锁定技，当你成为体力值大于你的角色使用【杀】的目标时，你进行判定：若判定结果为红桃，取消之。
skill_god_steadfast_valor.description_en: Locked: When you become the target of a [Kill] used by a character with more HP than you, make a judgment. If the result is a Heart card, cancel that [Kill].

skill_god_break_the_siege.description_cn: 使命技，游戏开始时，你令所有其他角色获得「围」标记。回合开始时，你令所有拥有「围」标记的角色将「围」标记移动到下家角色（若你获得「围」标记，则直接交给下家）。有「围」的角色受到伤害后，弃置其「围」标记。有「围」的角色回合开始时，你可以选择一项：1.弃置一张手牌，对其造成1点伤害；2.若其体力值不大于你，获得其一张手牌；若如此做，直到本回合结束，你视为在其攻击范围内。成功：你的回合开始时，若场上没有「围」标记，你获得技能「神著※」。失败：若你成功达成使命前，进入濒死状态时，你将体力值回复至1点，移除场上所有的「围」标记，然后弃置装备区所有牌。
skill_god_break_the_siege.description_en: Mission: At game start, all other characters gain a Siege token. At the start of your turn, all Sieged characters pass their Siege token to their next player (if you receive one, pass it on immediately). Sieged characters lose their token upon taking damage. When a Sieged character's turn begins, choose: 1. Discard 1 hand card and deal 1 damage to them; 2. If their HP does not exceed yours, take 1 hand card from them. If you act, you are treated as within their attack range until end of turn. Success: At the start of your turn, if no Siege tokens remain in play, gain skill Divine Record. Failure: If you enter the Dying state before succeeding, recover to 1 HP, remove all Siege tokens, and discard all your equipment.

skill_god_mount_hunt.description_cn: 锁定技，游戏开始时，从下家开始所有角色随机使用牌堆中的一张坐骑。你可将场上的一张进攻马当【杀】（不计入次数）、防御马当【闪】使用或打出，以此法失去坐骑的角色本回合非锁定技失效，你与其本回合受到的伤害+1且改为雷电伤害。
skill_god_mount_hunt.description_en: Locked: At the start of the game, each character beginning with your next-seat neighbor randomly equips one mount from the deck. You may treat one Attack Horse on the field as a [Kill] (not counting toward frequency) or one Defense Horse as a [Dodge] to use or play. A character who loses their mount this way has all non-Locked skills disabled for this turn, and all damage you and that character take this turn is +1 and becomes Thunder damage.

skill_god_unbridled_surge.description_cn: 当你使用或打出牌时，若你没有该花色的手牌，你可摸X张牌（X为场上与此牌花色相同的装备数量）。
skill_god_unbridled_surge.description_en: Whenever you use or play a card, if you have no hand cards of that suit, you may draw X cards (X = the number of equipment cards on the field that share that card's suit).

skill_god_ominous_signs.description_cn: 锁定技，当你使用或打出牌时，你获得此牌点数的「黄」标记，若「黄」的十位数变化，你获得牌堆中一张与变化后十位数点数相同的牌。
skill_god_ominous_signs.description_en: Locked: When you use or play a card, gain Yellow tokens equal to its point value. When the tens digit of your Yellow count changes, take a card from the deck matching that new tens digit in value.

skill_god_army_rampage.description_cn: 准备阶段，若「黄」标记数大于牌堆牌数，你可以移除所有「黄」并获得牌堆中若干张点数和为36的牌。
skill_god_army_rampage.description_en: During your prepare phase, if your Yellow token count exceeds the deck size, remove all Yellow tokens and take cards from the deck whose point values sum to 36.

skill_god_heavenly_calamity.description_cn: 牌堆洗过牌的回合结束时，你可以对至多三名其他角色各造成X点雷电伤害（X为其手牌中【闪】的数量且至少为1）。
skill_god_heavenly_calamity.description_en: At the end of a turn in which the deck was reshuffled, deal X Lightning damage to up to 3 other characters (X = number of [Dodge] in their hand cards, minimum 1).

skill_god_expand_territory.description_cn: 锁定技，你的手牌区添加三个分别令手牌具有以下效果的副区域（初始为未开发状态）：1、无次数与距离限制；2、伤害与回复值+1；3、无法被响应。出牌阶段开始和结束时，你将未分配的手牌分配至任意已开发的副区域中。
skill_god_expand_territory.description_en: Locked: Your hand card zone gains three sub-zones, each granting cards assigned to it one of the following effects (each sub-zone starts undeveloped): 1. No frequency or distance restrictions; 2. Damage and recovery values +1; 3. Cannot be responded to. At the start and end of your Play Phase, assign any unassigned hand cards to any already-developed sub-zone.

skill_god_daring_advance.description_cn: 锁定技，你造成或受到两次伤害后开发一个副区域，然后摸X张牌（X为已开发的副区域数，若你手牌数为全场最多则改为摸一张牌）。
skill_god_daring_advance.description_en: Locked: After you deal or take damage twice, develop one sub-zone, then draw X cards (X = the number of developed sub-zones; if your hand card count is the highest on the field, draw 1 card instead).

skill_god_surprise_route.description_cn: 觉醒技，每个回合结束后，若你的手牌副区域均已开发，你减1体力上限，获得「摧心」，然后将座次移动至除你以外的两名相邻角色之间并获得一个额外的回合。
skill_god_surprise_route.description_en: Awakening: At the end of each turn, if all your hand card sub-zones are developed, reduce your max HP by 1, gain [Crushing Push], then move your seat position to between any two adjacent characters other than yourself and take an extra turn.

skill_god_crushing_push.description_cn: 你使用手牌对上家或下家结算完毕后，可视为对下家或上家再次使用一次。
skill_god_crushing_push.description_en: After you finish resolving a hand card used against the character to your left or right, you may treat it as used once more against the character on the other side.

skill_god_star_soul.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可观看牌堆顶五张牌，用任意张手牌与其中等量牌进行交换并排序，然后你令一名其他角色展示你手牌与牌堆顶共五张牌，你对其依次使用其中的【杀】。
skill_god_star_soul.description_en: Once per Play Phase: View the top 5 cards of the deck. Swap any number of hand cards with an equal number of those cards and arrange them. Then have one other character reveal a combined 5 cards from your hand and the top of the deck; use any [Kill] among them against that character in sequence.

skill_god_celestial_surge.description_cn: 锁定技，结束阶段，你选择一个区域并弃置其中所有牌，然后依次弃置任意名其他角色相同区域各一张牌，因此弃置牌且未弃置【杀】的角色失去1点体力。
skill_god_celestial_surge.description_en: Locked: During your end phase, choose an area and discard all cards in it. Then discard 1 card from that same area of any number of other characters. Characters who discarded but had no [Kill] among them lose 1 HP.

skill_god_divine_revival.description_cn: 限定技，你进入濒死时，可回复X点体力（X为你本局游戏进入过濒死的次数），对一名角色造成等量雷电伤害并获得「回天」。
skill_god_divine_revival.description_en: Limited: When you enter the Dying state, recover X HP (X = number of times you have entered Dying this game), deal that much Lightning damage to one character, and gain Return of Heaven.

skill_god_return_of_heaven.description_cn: 一名体力值大于你的角色回合结束时，你可摸一张牌并执行一个额外的回合。每轮开始时，若你发动过此技能，你死亡。
skill_god_return_of_heaven.description_en: When a character with more HP than you ends their turn, draw 1 card and take an extra turn. At the start of each round, if you have activated this skill, you die.

skill_god_hidden_ingenuity.description_cn: 每轮开始时，你可以获得游戏外或弃牌堆中的【折戟】、【女装】、【驽马】各至多一张；当你使用上述牌时，你可以将手牌摸至体力上限。
skill_god_hidden_ingenuity.description_en: At the start of each round, you may take up to one copy each of [Blunt Halberd], [Women's Garb], and [Slow Horse] from outside the game or the discard pile. Whenever you use any of those cards, you may draw up to your max HP in hand cards.

skill_god_divine_mechanism.description_cn: 每回合限一次，以你为唯一目标的黑色牌结算结束后，你可以将场上一张装备牌当未以此法使用过的延时锦囊牌使用（均使用过后重置）；此类锦囊牌在判定区内同时拥有被转化的装备牌的效果。
skill_god_divine_mechanism.description_en: Once per turn, after a black card that targeted only you finishes resolving, you may use one equipment card on the field as a Delayed Tool card that has not yet been used this way (reset after all options are used). While that Tool card is in a judgment zone, it also has the effect of the equipment card it was converted from.

skill_god_transmute.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以将一种「藏巧」装备牌效果修改为下述对应顺序的牌直到你的下回合开始：【魂·诸葛连弩】；【魂·八卦阵】；【轨轨】。
skill_god_transmute.description_en: Once per Play Phase, you may change the effect of one [Hidden Ingenuity] equipment card to the corresponding card in the following sequence until the start of your next turn: [Soul · Zhuge Repeating Crossbow]; [Soul · Eight Trigrams Array]; [Rail Rail].

skill_god_asura.description_cn: 准备阶段，你可以弃置与你判定区内一张牌花色相同的一张手牌，弃置你判定区内的此牌，且你可以重复此流程。
skill_god_asura.description_en: During your Prepare Phase, you may discard one hand card that shares a suit with a card in your judgment zone to remove that judgment zone card. You may repeat this process.

skill_god_divine_might.description_cn: 锁定技，摸牌阶段，你多摸两张牌；你的手牌上限+2。
skill_god_divine_might.description_en: Locked: During your Draw Phase, draw 2 additional cards. Your hand card limit is +2.

skill_god_divine_halberd.description_cn: 锁定技，若你未装备武器，你使用【杀】指定的目标数上限+2。
skill_god_divine_halberd.description_en: Locked: If you have no weapon equipped, the maximum number of targets you may declare for each [Kill] is +2.
